TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ms'utux tnuxan ita Tayal heya ga waya thoyay mhenas pcpung nku gaga m'likuy ru m'knrin nku mykyas ru mkrakis lga, thoyay pkkita la ru s'aras naha mbkis na gluw utux gaga, yaba yaya ru gluw utux sali, mosa smiye nku sali na krakis galan naha ina. kya ku waya mble pkkayan nku sa'ing sali na mbkis ru yaba yaya lga, thoyay naha spgluw gaga nku ps'onun naha mkkita nku mrkysa ru krakis ga tgiwan mosa pcrux utux sali. kwara yaw hani ga yaca san maha ms'utux tnuxan.
S.PHON: ms~…ē Ēutux tnuxan ita tajal ńßeja …£a waja tńßojaj mńßenas~…ē p ¶~ ®puŇč nku …£a…£a m Ēlikuj ru m Ēknrin nku mjkjas~…ē ru mkrakis~…ē l…£a, tńßojaj pkkita la ru s~…ē Ēaras~…ē nańßa mő≤kis~…ē na …£luw utux …£a…£a, jaő≤a jaja ru …£luw utux s~…ēali, mos~…ēa s~…ēmije nku s~…ēali na krakis~…ē …£alan nańßa ina. kja ku waja mő≤le pkkajan nku s~…ēa ĒiŇč s~…ēali na mő≤kis~…ē ru jaő≤a jaja l…£a, tńßojaj nańßa s~…ēp…£luw …£a…£a nku ps~…ē Ēonun nańßa mkkita nku mrkjs~…ēa ru krakis~…ē …£a t…£iwan mos~…ēa p ¶~ ®rux utux s~…ēali. kwara jaw ńßani …£a ja ¶~ ®a s~…ēan mańßa ms~…ē Ēutux tnuxan.
S.FORM: ms'utux tnuxan ita Tayal heya ga waya thoyay mhenas pcpung nku gaga m'likuy ru m'knrin nku mykyas ru mkrakis lga, thoyay pkkita la ru s'aras naha mbkis na gluw utux gaga, yaba yaya ru gluw utux sali, mosa smiye nku sali na krakis galan naha ina. kya ku waya mble pkkayan nku sa'ing sali na mbkis ru yaba yaya lga, thoyay naha spgluw gaga nku ps'onun naha mkkita nku mrkysa ru krakis ga tgiwan mosa pcrux utux sali. kwara yaw hani ga yaca san maha ms'utux tnuxan.
